response.justification: Mohammed has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and testing infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) beyond one project
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change initiatives
